Fields.Name: Camera Target Distance
Fields.Description: Camera distance target

Fields.Description: Minimum X-axis rotation

Fields.Description: Lock X rotation shift rate

Fields.Description: Character base point offset

Fields.Name: Character Lock Range - Max Radius
Fields.Description: Maximum radius of character range

Fields.Name: Field of View - Vertical FOV
Fields.Description: Vertical angle of view

Fields.Name: Character Lock Range - Max Radius (Darkness)
Fields.Description: Lockable range of characters in dark places

Fields.Name: Character Lock Range - Max Radius (Total Darkness)
Fields.Description: Character lockable range in total darkness

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Upper Limit Height
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment height upper limit when non-lock-on is close

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Lower Limit Height
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment height lower limit when not locked on Proximity

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Auto Acquisition - Angle Range Left
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment when non-lock-on Left / right angle [deg] Proximity

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Auto Acquisition - Max Radius
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment distance when non-lock-on is close

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Auto Acquisition - Max Radius (Darkness)
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment distance at non-lock-on _ darkness proximity

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Auto Acquisition - Max Radius (Total Darkness)
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on when non-lock-on _ pitch black proximity

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Bullet - Max Radius
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment distance when non-lock-on bullet

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Bullet - Max Radius (Dark)
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment distance at non-lock-on _ darkness bullet

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Bullet - Max Radius (Pitch Dark
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on judgment distance at non-lock-on _ pitch black bullet

Fields.Name: Attack Capture - Bullet - Angle Range Left/Right
Fields.Description: Automatic lock-on left / right angle when non-lock-on bullet

Fields.Name: Lock Target Keep Time
Fields.Description: Time to continue locking even if the lock condition is not met (disabled at 0.0)

Fields.Name: Transition Chase Factor for Normal Character
Fields.Description: Normal character translation tracking rate (disabled at -1.0)
